vocabulary_meaning: article/prefix review decides base meaning only vs article-inclusive meaning vs context-sensitive acceptable variants
basic_noun_recognition: simple category labels only: noun, person, place, thing, object
no construct/suffix/adjective claims without separate review
direct_object_marker_recognition: must not treat את as normal vocabulary word

review_decision_note: Yossi policy decision applied. Row-level exact wording, answer-key language, distractor constraints, context display, Hebrew rendering, and protected-preview gate review remain required before any generation.
